register.contactPrefixHaveCode: Don't have an access code? Contact
register.contactAdminFallback: your community administrator to request one.
register.closedBody: New accounts require an access code from an administrator.

visitList.title: Visits
visitList.emptyDescription: No visits match these filters yet. Log your first outreach visit to get started.
visitList.emptyDescriptionShort: No visits match these filters yet.

visitForm.editSubtitle: Update the details of this visit.
visitForm.scheduleSubtitle: Plan an upcoming outreach event — you can fill in attendance once it happens.
visitForm.logSubtitle: Record an outreach visit that already happened.
visitForm.descriptionPlaceholder: What did you cover? Anything future visitors should know?
visitForm.additionalPresentersDescription: If a colleague already logged this same event, don't re-enter the headcount here — it would double-count people reached in the community totals.
visitForm.tagsDescription: Free-text labels for grouping and filtering (e.g. grant name, program, theme). Press Enter to add.
visitForm.relationshipDetailPlaceholder: e.g. former grad student, met at AAAS
visitForm.hostNotesPlaceholder: Context on the host or the relationship — how the connection started, follow-up ideas…
visitForm.reflectionPlaceholder: What worked, what didn't, ideas for next time…
visitForm.coverageDescription: Link to press coverage, social posts, videos, or blog write-ups of this event. Reports show which activities drew which kinds of coverage.
visitForm.confirmLargeCount: You entered {{count}} people reached. Is that correct?

validation.peopleReachedTooLargeTypo: That seems too large (max {{max}}). Check for a typo.
validation.peopleReachedRequired: How many people did you reach?

visitDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this visit? This cannot be undone.

backupsCard.title: Backups
backupsCard.description: Nightly database dumps stored on the server. Last backup: <bold>{{lastBackup}}</bold> · {{count}} kept · {{size}}. Download copies and keep them somewhere safe off this machine.
backupsCard.backupRequestedNotice: A backup was requested — it appears here within a minute.
backupsCard.emptyState: No backups found yet. One runs automatically each night.

dbToolsCard.title: Export & import data
dbToolsCard.description: Move or combine outreach data between DOCENT instances. The export is a portable JSON file of institutions, venues, visits, and their authors. Importing <merges>merges</merges> — records that already exist (matched by natural key) are left untouched, so re-importing never creates duplicates. This is separate from the automatic database <backups>backups</backups> below.
dbToolsCard.authorsCreated_one: {{count}} author placeholder created (inactive — enable a login from the user list if needed)
dbToolsCard.authorsCreated_other: {{count}} author placeholders created (inactive — enable a login from the user list if needed)

siteSetupCard.title: Site address & domain setup
siteSetupCard.collapsedSubtitle: — point a subdomain at this server (optional)
siteSetupCard.description: Give your instance a friendly web address like https://docent.your-org.edu. This takes two things: a DNS “A record” your IT department adds (pointing the name at your machine), and HTTPS on the server — which DOCENT already bundles. Fill in the two fields below and this panel writes the exact request to send IT and the one-line change that turns HTTPS on.
siteSetupCard.publicSiteAddressDescription: Saved with your instance and used to build the setup instructions below.
siteSetupCard.invalidAddressWarning: That doesn’t look like a valid web address — use something like https://docent.your-org.edu.
siteSetupCard.serverIpDescription: Find this in your cloud/VM console (e.g. the instance's public IPv4). Not stored — only used to fill in the request.
siteSetupCard.howItFitsTogetherBody: 1. IT creates an <strongRecord>A record</strongRecord> so <hostCode>{{host}}</hostCode> resolves to your machine’s IP, and opens ports <strongPort80>80</strongPort80> and <strongPort443>443</strongPort443>. 2. You set <domainCode>SITE_DOMAIN</domainCode> in <envCode>.env</envCode> and re-run <scriptCode>./scripts/start.sh</scriptCode> — DOCENT’s bundled <caddyLink>Caddy</caddyLink> proxy then serves HTTPS and gets a free, auto-renewing certificate. Nothing extra to install. That’s the whole setup.
siteSetupCard.requestLabel: 1 · Request to send your IT / DNS department
siteSetupCard.footerNote: Once IT confirms the record is live, add that line to <envCode>.env</envCode> and run <scriptCode>./scripts/start.sh</scriptCode> — the bundled Caddy proxy starts automatically and fetches the certificate. DNS changes can take up to an hour to take effect worldwide. Leaving <domainCode>SITE_DOMAIN</domainCode> empty keeps the app on <localhostCode>http://localhost</localhostCode> only.
siteSetupCard.dnsRequestSubject: Subject: DNS request — new A record for {{host}}
siteSetupCard.dnsRequestIntro: We're running a small self-hosted web app on our own server and would like a subdomain to point to it. Could you please create this DNS record?
siteSetupCard.dnsRequestIpv6Note: If we also have an IPv6 address, please add a matching AAAA record to it.
siteSetupCard.dnsRequestClosing: Once the record is live we'll serve the site over HTTPS — the server obtains and renews its own TLS certificate automatically, so nothing else is needed on your end. The only inbound ports the server uses are 80 and 443.
siteSetupCard.envSnippetComment: in your .env on the server, then re-run ./scripts/start.sh

institutionImportCard.title: Import institutions near a location
institutionImportCard.description: Pull schools, colleges, museums and libraries from OpenStreetMap within a radius of a place, so they appear on the Map as coverage targets.
institutionImportCard.locationPlaceholder: Address, place name, or "lat, lon" — e.g. University of Tennessee, Knoxville
institutionImportCard.largeRadiusHint: Large radii can take up to a minute (it queries OpenStreetMap live).
institutionImportCard.locationRequired: Enter an address, place, or "lat, lon"
institutionImportCard.importCompleteMessage: {{inserted}} added, {{updated}} updated within {{radiusKm}} km of {{location}}. {{totalInRegion}} total in this area.

institutionManagerCard.title: Institution catalog
institutionManagerCard.description: Add institutions the OpenStreetMap importer can’t find (some schools are only mapped as a building, so they never import). New entries appear on the Map as coverage targets.
institutionManagerCard.locationDescription: Address or place to look up, or a raw “lat, lon”
institutionManagerCard.searchPlaceholder: Search catalog by name or city

admin.title: Admin
admin.registrationDescription: New accounts require this access code. Share it only with people you want to let in; clear it to close sign-up entirely. The contact email is shown on the login and register pages so people know where to request a code or a password reset.
admin.communityNameDescription: Shown in the header, on the login page, and on the public impact page. Empty = plain DOCENT branding.
admin.publicImpactPageDescription: Serve a read-only summary of your community's impact (totals, charts, recent activity — never private notes or names) at <link>/impact</link>. Anyone with the link can view it.
admin.memberDirectoryDescription: Let any signed-in user browse the member directory (schools attended, languages spoken) — not just admins. Admins can always see it.
admin.loginMessageDescription: Optional announcement shown on the login page — a welcome note, a maintenance notice, whatever your community needs to see before signing in. Supports basic Markdown (**bold**, *italic*, [links](https://…), lists). Leave blank to show nothing.
admin.mapStartingPointDescription: Where the Map page centers on first load, before anyone pans around. Defaults to Tennessee.
admin.mergeModalDescription: All of {{name}}'s visits and venues move to the account you pick, then {{name}}'s account is deleted. This can't be undone.
admin.deactivatedUsersNote: Deactivated users can no longer log in, but their visits stay in the community record.
admin.tempPasswordBody: Share this one-time password with <bold>{{name}}</bold> over a secure channel. They should log in and change it from their profile. It is shown only once.

dashboard.title: Analysis
dashboard.subtitle: Your community’s collective outreach impact.
dashboard.noDataInRange: No data recorded in this range yet.

impact.unavailableDescription: The community hasn’t enabled its public impact page.
impact.tagline: Community outreach impact — reaching out to schools, museums, libraries, and the public.

profile.title: Profile
profile.schoolsDescription: Adding a school also lists you as an alumnus contact on its page.

directory.title: Directory
directory.subtitle: Fellow communicators — the schools they've attended and the languages they speak.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitlePrefix: Export a shareable summary of your
reports.subtitleSuffix: — for grant reports and annual reviews. Private notes, reflections, and ratings are never included.
reports.emptyState: No activities match these filters. Try “{{everyone}}” instead of “{{myActivities}}”, set Status to “{{all}}”, or widen the date range.
reports.showingFirst: Showing the first {{limit}} of {{total}} activities. The download includes all of them.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Upcoming planned events across the community. Mark one done to record attendance.
schedule.emptyDescription: No upcoming planned events match these filters. Schedule one and it will appear here — ready to export to your calendar.

venuePicker.addressSearchDescription: Optional — look up a place to prefill the fields below. Never changes the name or type above.
venuePicker.addressSearchPlaceholder: Start typing an address or place…

connectionForm.relationshipDetailPlaceholder: Optional — e.g. coaches the robotics club

venueList.title: Venues
venueList.emptyDescription: Add a school, college, museum, or library to start tracking outreach there.

venueDetail.mergeDescription: Pick duplicate venues to absorb. Their visits move to <bold>{{name}}</bold> and the duplicates are deleted. This can’t be undone.
venueDetail.mergeSearchPlaceholder: Search venues by name or city
venueDetail.cannotDeleteMessage_one: This venue has {{formattedCount}} visit. Delete or reassign it first.
venueDetail.cannotDeleteMessage_other: This venue has {{formattedCount}} visits. Delete or reassign them first.
venueDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this venue? This cannot be undone.
venueDetail.noContacts: No contacts recorded yet — add a connection or log a visit with a host.
venueDetail.noVisits: No visits recorded at this venue yet
